# Documentation

## Documentation

- [Insilico Terminal](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/welcome/insilico-terminal.md)
- [Terminal 5.0](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/welcome/terminal-5.0.md): Enhanced Terminal: Configurable, powerful, and faster. Multi Mode offers advanced account, layout management, and more.
- [Registration](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/welcome/registration.md): Let's go!
- [Security](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/welcome/security.md): We take your security serious!
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/welcome/frequently-asked-questions.md): FAQ and Important Information
- [Terms of Service](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/welcome/terms-of-service.md)
- [Creating an API Key](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/setup/creating-an-api-key.md): Initial Terminal setup
- [Creating a Bybit API Key](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/setup/creating-an-api-key/creating-a-bybit-api-key.md)
- [Creating a Bitmex API Key](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/setup/creating-an-api-key/creating-a-bitmex-api-key.md): Updated 14th September 2023
- [Creating a Binance Key](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/setup/creating-an-api-key/creating-a-binance-key.md): Updated: 9th Feb 2024
- [Creating a Bitget API Key](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/setup/creating-an-api-key/creating-a-bitget-api-key.md): Updated 14th August 2023
- [Creating a Coinbase API Key](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/setup/creating-an-api-key/creating-a-coinbase-api-key.md)
- [Creating an OKX API Key](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/setup/creating-an-api-key/creating-an-okx-api-key.md): Watch our instructional video or follow the steps below:
- [Creating a Blofin API Key](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/setup/creating-an-api-key/creating-a-blofin-api-key.md)
- [Creating a Cryptocom API Key](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/setup/creating-an-api-key/creating-a-cryptocom-api-key.md)
- [Creating a Kraken API Key](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/setup/creating-an-api-key/creating-a-kraken-api-key.md)
- [Creating an Apex API Key](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/setup/creating-an-api-key/creating-an-apex-api-key.md)
- [Creating a Nado API Key](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/setup/creating-an-api-key/creating-a-nado-api-key.md)
- [Creating a Lighter API Key](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/setup/creating-an-api-key/creating-a-lighter-api-key.md)
- [Creating an Extended API Key](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/setup/creating-an-api-key/creating-an-extended-api-key.md)
- [Adding Hyperliquid](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/setup/adding-hyperliquid.md): Please be aware there are two ways of connecting to hyperliquid
- [Adding your API Key to the Terminal](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/setup/adding-your-api-key-to-the-terminal.md)
- [Synchronize API Keys Across Devices](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/setup/synchronize-api-keys-across-devices.md)
- [Progressive Web App (PWA) Guide](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/setup/progressive-web-app-pwa-guide.md)
- [Stream Deck](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/setup/stream-deck.md)
- [UI overview](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/ui-overview.md)
- [Performance](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/performance.md): Trade with a massively improved performance boost during those high octane news events. Smooth UI updates, no lag, no freezing. Terminal 5.0 is optimized to handle huge amounts of volatile market data
- [Multi Mode](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/multi-mode.md): Multi Mode is the core Terminal 3.0 experience.
- [Multi Account](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/multi-mode/multi-account.md): No more sluggish account switching
- [Multi Layout](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/multi-mode/multi-layout.md): Create tabs and switch views in an instant
- [Link System](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/multi-mode/link-system.md): (Only in Multi mode) Use color-coding to synchronize components
- [Hotkeys](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/multi-mode/hotkeys.md): (Multi mode)
- [Classic Mode](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/classic-mode.md): One app, two modes
- [Mobile Mode](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/mobile-mode.md): You can also use the Terminal on your mobile phone!
- [Header controls](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/header-controls.md)
- [Interactive Chart](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/interactive-chart.md)
- [Designer](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/interactive-chart/designer.md): Visually design your orders before executing
- [Skip initial candles](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/interactive-chart/skip-initial-candles.md)
- [Tradingview Chart](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/tradingview-chart.md)
- [Orderbook](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/orderbook.md)
- [Trades + Liquidations](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/trades-+-liquidations.md)
- [Tickers / Instruments](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/tickers-instruments.md)
- [Activity](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/activity.md)
- [Orders](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/orders.md)
- [Positions](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/positions.md)
- [DOM](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/dom.md)
- [PnL Cards](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/pnl-cards.md)
- [Aggr](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/aggr.md)
- [Balances](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/balances.md)
- [Layouts](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/layouts.md)
- [Basket Trading](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/basket-trading.md): Basket Trading via new Complex Orders component: Create execute, save and share asset baskets with the new Complex Orders component. Works with multiple accounts even!
- [Market](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/market.md): This used to be part of the old Orderform.
- [News](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/application-elements/news.md)
- [Place Order Overview](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/execution-panel/place-order-overview.md): This replaces the old Orderform component on the left, for Instrument Statistics, use the new Market component.
- [“Size” Input / Slider bar](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/execution-panel/size-input-slider-bar.md)
- ["Reduce" Switch](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/execution-panel/reduce-switch.md)
- [“TP/SL” Switch](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/execution-panel/tp-sl-switch.md)
- [Smart Hedging](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/execution-panel/smart-hedging.md)
- [Buy / Sell Buttons](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/execution-panel/buy-sell-buttons.md)
- [Margin / Leverage Control](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/execution-panel/margin-leverage-control.md)
- [Limit](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/limit-tab/limit.md)
- [Stop Limit](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/limit-tab/stop-limit.md)
- [Click Placement](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/limit-tab/click-placement.md)
- [Chase](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/limit-tab/chase.md)
- [Scale](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/limit-tab/scale.md)
- [Scale Side](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/limit-tab/scale-side.md)
- [Market](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/market/market.md)
- [Stop Market Order](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/market/stop-market-order.md)
- [Swarm](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/market/swarm.md)
- [TWAP](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/market/twap.md)
- [Overview](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/cortex/overview.md)
- [Setup](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/cortex/setup.md)
- [Server-Side Execution](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/cortex/server-side-execution.md)
- [TWAP Execution](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/cortex/twap-execution.md)
- [Conditional Orders](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/cortex/conditional-orders.md)
- [Trigger Types](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/cortex/trigger-types.md)
- [Activity and Order History](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/cortex/activity-and-order-history.md)
- [Overview](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/terminal-cli/overview.md)
- ['Constant' values](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/terminal-cli/constant-values.md)
- [User Defined Variables](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/terminal-cli/user-defined-variables.md)
- [General Commands](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/terminal-cli/general-commands.md)
- [Chaining](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/terminal-cli/chaining.md)
- [Repeat](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/terminal-cli/repeat.md)
- [Shortcut / Hotkeys](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/terminal-cli/shortcut-hotkeys.md): All key binding is performed through the CLI
- [Alias](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/terminal-cli/alias.md)
- [UI Control](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/terminal-cli/ui-control.md): Commands that can be utilized to control different aspects of the Terminal user interface. NOTE: This is currently only available for the DOM but will expand to the rest of app later
- [Simple Ordering](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/terminal-cli/simple-ordering.md)
- [Stops](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/terminal-cli/stops.md)
- [Ordering with Stops](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/terminal-cli/ordering-with-stops.md)
- [Bump Orders](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/terminal-cli/bump-orders.md)
- [Cancel Orders](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/terminal-cli/cancel-orders.md)
- [Close Position](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/terminal-cli/close-position.md)
- [Reverse Position](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/terminal-cli/reverse-position.md)
- [Scale Orders](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/terminal-cli/scale-orders.md)
- [Chase Orders](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/terminal-cli/chase-orders.md)
- [Swarm Order](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/terminal-cli/swarm-order.md)
- [TWAP Order](https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/terminal-cli/twap-order.md)

# Agent Instructions: Querying This Documentation

If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.

Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:

```
GET https://docs.insilicoterminal.com/documentation/welcome/insilico-terminal.md?ask=<question>
```

The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.

Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
